creator: mitchnull@gmail.com
text:
Plugins installed via Help->Install plugins from within eclipse doesn't work in eclipse-3.5.2_1 (also checked eclipse-3.5.2 before, same issue there).

The plugin installation is successful, installed plugin files appear under ~/.eclipse, they are listed in the "Installed Software" panel in eclipse, but they do not actually load/work.

Tested with the subclipse and the vrapper plugins.

How-To-Repeat: Install eclipse port
Install some plugin from the integrated plugin istaller (Help -> install software)

plugin will be installed but doesn't work.
